verses.geez: ወልህቀ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ወኀለፈ ፡ መዋዕሊሁ ፡ ወባረኮ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ በኵሉ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam was old, advanced in days, and the Lord blessed Abraam in all things.
translations.kjv: And Abraham was old, and well stricken in age: and the LORD had blessed Abraham in all things.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለወልዱ ፡ ዘይልህቅ ፡ ዘውእቱ ፡ መጋቢሁ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ንዋዩ ፡ ደይ ፡ እዴከ ፡ ላዕለ ፡
                  እዴየ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam said to his servant the elder of his house, who had rule over all his possessions, Put thy hand under my thigh,
translations.kjv: And Abraham said unto his eldest servant of his house, that ruled over all that he had, Put, I pray thee, thy hand under my thigh:

verses.geez:
ወኣምሕለከ ፡ በአምላከ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወምድር ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትንሣእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ፡ እምነ ፡ አዋልደ ፡
                  ከናአን ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ አኀድር ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: and I will adjure thee by the Lord the God of heaven, and the God of the earth, that thou take not a wife for my son Isaac from the daughters of the Chananites, with whom I dwell, in the midst of them.
translations.kjv: And I will make thee swear by the LORD, the God of heaven, and the God of the earth, that thou shalt not take a wife unto my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, among whom I dwell:

verses.geez: ዳእሙ ፡ ሑር ፡ ብሔርየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ተወለድኩ ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ በህየ ።

translations.lxx: But thou shalt go instead to my country, where I was born, and to my tribe, and thou shalt take from thence a wife for my son Isaac.
translations.kjv: But thou shalt go unto my country, and to my kindred, and take a wife unto my son Isaac.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ለእመኬ ፡ ኢፈቀደት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ትምጻእ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ብሔረ ፡ ኣግብኦኑ ፡
                  ለወልድከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ወፃእከ ።

translations.lxx: And the servant said to him, Shall I carry back thy son to the land whence thou camest forth, if haply the woman should not be willing to return with me to this land?
translations.kjv: And the servant said unto him, Peradventure the woman will not be willing to follow me unto this land: must I needs bring thy son again unto the land from whence thou camest?

verses.geez: ወይቤሎ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለወልዱ ፡ ዑቅ ፡ ርእሰከ ፡ ኢታግብኦ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And Abraam said to him, Take heed to thyself that thou carry not my son back thither.
translations.kjv: And Abraham said unto him, Beware thou that thou bring not my son thither again.

verses.geez:
እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ ወምድር ፡ ዘአውፅአኒ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አበውየ ፡ ወእምነ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡
                  ተወለድኩ ፡ በውስቴታ ፡ ዘመሐለ ፡ ሊተ ፡ ወይቤለኒ ፡ ለከ ፡ እሁበከ ፡ ዛተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ወለዘርእከ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ይፌኑ ፡
                  መልአኮ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ እምህየ ።

translations.lxx: The Lord the God of heaven, and the God of the earth, who took me out of my father's house, and out of the land whence I sprang, who spoke to me, and who swore to me, saying, I will give this land to thee and to thy seed, he shall send his angel before thee, and thou shalt take a wife to my son from thence.
translations.kjv: The LORD God of heaven, which took me from my father’s house, and from the land of my kindred, and which spake unto me, and that sware unto me, saying, Unto thy seed will I give this land; he shall send his angel before thee, and thou shalt take a wife unto my son from thence.

verses.geez:
ወእመሰ ፡ ኢፈቀደት ፡ ባሕቱ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ ትምጻእ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ምድር ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ አንተ ፡
                  እምነ ፡ መሐላ ፡ ወዘንተ ፡ ዑቅ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢታግብኦ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ ህየ ።

translations.lxx: And if the woman should not be willing to come with thee into this land, thou shalt be clear from my oath, only carry not my son thither again.
translations.kjv: And if the woman will not be willing to follow thee, then thou shalt be clear from this my oath: only bring not my son thither again.

verses.geez: ወወደየ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እደ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ እግዚኡ ፡ ወመሐለ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ በእንተዝ ፡ ነገር ።

translations.lxx: And the servant put his hand under the thigh of his master Abraam, and swore to him concerning this matter.
translations.kjv: And the servant put his hand under the thigh of Abraham his master, and sware to him concerning that matter.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ዐሠርተ ፡ አግማለ ፡ እምአግማለ ፡ እግዚኡ ፡ ወኵሎ ፡ ሠናየ ፡ ዘእግዚኡ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ነሥአ
                  ፡ ወተንሥአ ፡ ወሖረ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ አፍላግ ፡ ሀገረ ፡ ናኮር ።

translations.lxx: And the servant took ten camels of his master's camels, and he took of all the goods of his master with him, and he arose and went into Mesopotamia to the city of Nachor.
translations.kjv: And the servant took ten camels of the camels of his master, and departed; for all the goods of his master were in his hand: and he arose, and went to Mesopotamia, unto the city of Nahor.

verses.geez:
ወአቤተ ፡ አግማሊሁ ፡ አፍአ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ ይወፅኣ ፡ ሐዋርያተ
                  ፡ ማይ ።

translations.lxx: And he rested his camels without the city by the well of water towards evening, when damsels go forth to draw water.
translations.kjv: And he made his camels to kneel down without the city by a well of water at the time of the evening, even the time that women go out to draw water.

verses.geez: ወይቤ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡

translations.lxx: And he said, O Lord God of my master Abraam, prosper my way before me to day, and deal mercifully with my master Abraam.
translations.kjv: And he said, O LORD God of my master Abraham, I pray thee, send me good speed this day, and shew kindness unto my master Abraham.

verses.geez: ናሁ ፡ ቆምኩ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ወአዋልዲሆሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ይወፅኣ ፡ ይቅድሓ ፡ ማየ ።

translations.lxx: Lo! I stand by the well of water, and the daughters of them that inhabit the city come forth to draw water.
translations.kjv: Behold, I stand here by the well of water; and the daughters of the men of the city come out to draw water:

verses.geez:
ወትኩን ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ድንግል ፡ እንተ ፡ እብላ ፡ አነ ፡ አጽንኒ ፡ ቀሡተኪ ፡ እስተይ ፡ ማየ ፡ ወትብለኒ ፡ ድንግል ፡
                  ስተይ ፡ አንተኒ ፡ ወለአግማሊከኒ ፡ ኣስቲ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይረውዩ ፡ ወኪያሃ ፡ አስተደለውከ ፡ ለገብርከ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወበዝንቱ ፡
                  ኣአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርከ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ አብርሃም ።

translations.lxx: And it shall be, the virgin to whomsoever I shall say, Incline thy water-pot, that I may drink, and she shall say, Drink thou, and I will give thy camels drink, until they shall have done drinking—even this one thou hast prepared for thy servant Isaac, and hereby shall I know that thou hast dealt mercifully with my master Abraam.
translations.kjv: And let it come to pass, that the damsel to whom I shall say, Let down thy pitcher, I pray thee, that I may drink; and she shall say, Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also: let the same be she that thou hast appointed for thy servant Isaac; and thereby shall I know that thou hast shewed kindness unto my master.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ ዘእንበለ ፡ ያኅልቅ ፡ ተናግሮ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ በልቡ ፡ ወነያ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ትወጽእ ፡ እንተ ፡ ተወልደት ፡ ለባቱኤል
                  ፡ ወልደ ፡ ሜልካ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ለናኮር ፡ እኀሁ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ወትጸውር ፡ ቀሡተ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ መትከፍታ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass before he had done speaking in his mind, that behold, Rebecca the daughter of Bathuel, the son of Melcha, the wife of Nachor, and the same the brother of Abraam, came forth, having a water-pot on her shoulders.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, before he had done speaking, that, behold, Rebekah came out, who was born to Bethuel, son of Milcah, the wife of Nahor, Abraham’s brother, with her pitcher upon her shoulder.

verses.geez:
ወሠናይ ፡ ገጻ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ለይእቲ ፡ ወለት ፡ ወድንግል ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወኢታአምር ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ወወረደት ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡
                  ወቀድሐት ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ዐርገት ፤

translations.lxx: And the virgin was very beautiful in appearance, she was a virgin, a man had not known her; and she went down to the well, and filled her water-pot, and came up.
translations.kjv: And the damsel was very fair to look upon, a virgin, neither had any man known her: and she went down to the well, and filled her pitcher, and came up.

verses.geez: ሮጸ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ አስትይኒ ፡ ሕቀ ፡ ማየ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቀሡትኪ ።

translations.lxx: And the servant ran up to meet her, and said, Give me a little water to drink out of thy pitcher;
translations.kjv: And the servant ran to meet her, and said, Let me, I pray thee, drink a little water of thy pitcher.

verses.geez: ወትቤሎ ፡ ስተይ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ወአውረደት ፡ ቀሡታ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ በዲበ ፡ መትከፍታ ፡ ወአስተየቶ ፡ እስከ ፡ ይረዊ ።

translations.lxx: and she said, Drink, Sir; and she hasted, and let down the pitcher upon her arm, and gave him to drink, till he ceased drinking.
translations.kjv: And she said, Drink, my lord: and she hasted, and let down her pitcher upon her hand, and gave him drink.

verses.geez: ወትቤሎ ፡ ለአግማሊከኒ ፡ እቀደሕ ፡ ወይስተዩ ፡ ኵሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And she said, I will also draw water for thy camels, till they shall all have drunk.
translations.kjv: And when she had done giving him drink, she said, I will draw water for thy camels also, until they have done drinking.

verses.geez: ወሶጠት ፡ ቀሡታ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምስታይ ፡ ወሮጸት ፡ ወቀድሐት ፡ ለአግማሊሁ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And she hasted, and emptied the water-pot into the trough, and ran to the well to draw again, and drew water for all the camels.
translations.kjv: And she hasted, and emptied her pitcher into the trough, and ran again unto the well to draw water, and drew for all his camels.

verses.geez:
ወውእቱሰ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ይሬእያ ፡ ክመ ፡ ወያረምም ፡ ከመ ፡ ይርአይ ፡ እመ ፡ ይሤርሖ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ፍኖቶ ፡ ወለእመሂ
                  ፡ አልቦ ።

translations.lxx: And the man took great notice of her, and remained silent to know whether the Lord had made his way prosperous or not.
translations.kjv: And the man wondering at her held his peace, to wit whether the LORD had made his journey prosperous or not.

verses.geez:
ወእምዘ ፡ ረወዩ ፡ አግማሊሁ ፡ ነሥአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ አዕኑገ ፡ ዘወርቅ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ሕልቅ ፡ ድልወቱ ፡ ወአውቃፈ ፡
                  ለእደዊሃ ፡ ዘዘ ፡ ዐሥሩ ፡ ሕልቅ ፡ ደልወቱ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when all the camels ceased drinking, that the man took golden ear-rings, each of a drachm weight, and he put two bracelets on her hands, their weight was ten pieces of gold.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, as the camels had done drinking, that the man took a golden earring of half a shekel weight, and two bracelets for her hands of ten shekels weight of gold;

verses.geez: ወተስእላ ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ ወለተ ፡ መኑ ፡ እንቲ ፡ ንግርኒ ፡ እስኩ ፡ ለእመ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ማኅደረ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡኪ ፡ ለነ ።

translations.lxx: And he asked her, and said, Whose daughter art thou? Tell me if there is room for us to lodge with thy father.
translations.kjv: And said, Whose daughter art thou? tell me, I pray thee: is there room in thy father’s house for us to lodge in?

verses.geez: ወትቤሎ ፡ ወለት ፡ ባቱኤል ፡ አነ ፡ ዘተወልደ ፡ ለናከር ።

translations.lxx: And she said to him, I am the daughter of Bathuel the son of Melcha, whom she bore to Nachor.
translations.kjv: And she said unto him, I am the daughter of Bethuel the son of Milcah, which she bare unto Nahor.

verses.geez: ወቦቱ ፡ ኀቤነ ፡ ሣዕረኒ ፡ ወእክለኒ ፡ ወማኅደረኒ ፡ ለአግማሊከ ።

translations.lxx: And she said to him, We have both straw and much provender, and a place for resting.
translations.kjv: She said moreover unto him, We have both straw and provender enough, and room to lodge in.

verses.geez: ወአደሞ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወሰገደ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And the man being well pleased, worshipped the Lord,
translations.kjv: And the man bowed down his head, and worshipped the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወይቤ ፡ ይተባረክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኩ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ ዘኢያውጽአ ፡ ለጽደቁ ፡ ወለርትዑ ፡ እምነ ፡
                  እግዚእየ ፡ ወሊተኒ ፡ ሠርሐኒ ፡ [ፍኖትየ ፡] ውስተ ፡ ቤቱ ፡ ለእኁሁ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ለአብርሃም ።

translations.lxx: and said, Blessed be the Lord the God of my master Abraam, who has not suffered his righteousness to fail, nor his truth from my master, and the Lord has brought me prosperously to the house of the brother of my lord.
translations.kjv: And he said, Blessed be the LORD God of my master Abraham, who hath not left destitute my master of his mercy and his truth: I being in the way, the LORD led me to the house of my master’s brethren.

verses.geez: ወሖረት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ወለት ፡ ወነገረተ ፡ ለቤተ ፡ እማ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ነገረ ።

translations.lxx: And the damsel ran and reported to the house of her mother according to these words.
translations.kjv: And the damsel ran, and told them of her mother’s house these things.

verses.geez: ወባቲ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ እኅወ ፡ ዘስሙ ፡ ላባ ፡ ወሮጸ ፡ ላባ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዝኩ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ አፍአ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፤

translations.lxx: And Rebecca had a brother whose name was Laban; and Laban ran out to meet the man, to the well.
translations.kjv: And Rebekah had a brother, and his name was Laban: and Laban ran out unto the man, unto the well.

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ ርእየ ፡ አዕኑጊሃ ፡ ወአውቃፈሃኒ ፡ ለእኅቱ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ከመዝ ፡ ይቤለኒ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወመጽአ ፡
                  ኀበ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይቀውም ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅት ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when he saw the ear-rings and the bracelets on the hands of his sister, and when he heard the words of Rebecca his sister, saying, Thus the man spoke to me, that he went to the man, as he stood by the camels at the well.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when he saw the earring and bracelets upon his sister’s hands, and when he heard the words of Rebekah his sister, saying, Thus spake the man unto me; that he came unto the man; and, behold, he stood by the camels at the well.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ ነዓ ፡ ባእ ፡ ይትባረክ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ምንት ፡ ያቀውመከ ፡ አፍአ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አስተዳለውነ ፡ ማኅደረ ፡
                  ወቤተ ፡ ለአግማሊከ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to him, Come in hither, thou blessed of the Lord, why standest thou without, whereas I have prepared the house and a place for the camels?
translations.kjv: And he said, Come in, thou blessed of the LORD; wherefore standest thou without? for I have prepared the house, and room for the camels.

verses.geez:
ወቦአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወአኅደረ ፡ አግማሊሁ ፡ ወአቅረቡ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሐሠረ ፡ ወእክለኒ ፡ ለአግማሊሁ ፡ ወአምጽኡ ፡
                  ሎቱ ፡ ማየ ፡ ለእግሩ ፡ ወለእልክቱኒ ፡ ዕደው ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And the man entered into the house, and unloaded the camels, and gave the camels straw and provender, and water to wash his feet, and the feet of the men that were with him.
translations.kjv: And the man came into the house: and he ungirded his camels, and gave straw and provender for the camels, and water to wash his feet, and the men’s feet that were with him.

verses.geez: ወአምጽኡ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ኅብስተ ፡ ይብላዕ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢይበልዕ ፡ እስከ ፡ እነግር ፡ ቃልየ ፡ ወይቤልዎ ፡ ንግር ።

translations.lxx: And he set before them loaves to eat; but he said, I will not eat, until I have told my errand. And he said, Speak on.
translations.kjv: And there was set meat before him to eat: but he said, I will not eat, until I have told mine errand. And he said, Speak on.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ገብረ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ አነ ።

translations.lxx: And he said, I am a servant of Abraam;
translations.kjv: And he said, I am Abraham’s servant.

verses.geez:
እግዚአብሔር ፡ ባረኮ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ጥቀ ፡ ወአዕበዮ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ አልህምተ ፡ ወአባግዐ ፡ ወወርቀ ፡ ወብሩረ ፡
                  [ወአግብርተ ፡ ወአእማተ ፡] ወአግማለ ፡ ወአእዲገ ።

translations.lxx: and the Lord has blessed my master greatly, and he is exalted, and he has given him sheep, and calves, and silver, and gold, servants and servant-maids, camels, and asses.
translations.kjv: And the LORD hath blessed my master greatly; and he is become great: and he hath given him flocks, and herds, and silver, and gold, and menservants, and maidservants, and camels, and asses.

verses.geez:
ወወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሳራ ፡ ብእሲቱ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ለአብርሃም ፡ አሐደ ፡ ወልደ ፡ በዘረሥአ ፡ ወወሀቦ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘቦቱ
                  ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And Sarrha my master's wife bore one son to my master after he had grown old; and he gave him whatever he had.
translations.kjv: And Sarah my master’s wife bare a son to my master when she was old: and unto him hath he given all that he hath.

verses.geez:
ወአምሐለኒ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ወይቤለኒ ፡ ኢትንሣእ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ እምአዋልደ ፡ ከናአን ፡ እለ ፡ አኀድር ፡ አነ
                  ፡ ውስቴቶን ።

translations.lxx: And my master caused me to swear, saying, Thou shalt not take a wife to my son of the daughters of the Chananites, among whom I sojourn in their land.
translations.kjv: And my master made me swear, saying, Thou shalt not take a wife to my son of the daughters of the Canaanites, in whose land I dwell:

verses.geez: ዳእሙ ፡ ሑር ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡየ ፡ ወውስተ ፡ ነገድየ ፡ ወንሣእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ እምህየ ።

translations.lxx: But thou shalt go to the house of my father, and to my tribe, and thou shalt take thence a wife for my son.
translations.kjv: But thou shalt go unto my father’s house, and to my kindred, and take a wife unto my son.

verses.geez: ወእቤሎ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ዮጊ ፡ ኢትፈቅድ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ መጺአ ፡ ምስሌየ ።

translations.lxx: And I said to my master, Haply the woman will not go with me.
translations.kjv: And I said unto my master, Peradventure the woman will not follow me.

verses.geez:
ወይቤለኒ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘአሥመርኩ ፡ በቅድሜሁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ይፌኑ ፡ መልአኮ ፡ ቅድሜከ ፡ ወያሤኒ ፡
                  ፍኖተከ ፡ ወትነሥእ ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ለወልድየ ፡ እምህየ ፡ (ወእመአኮ ፡) እምነገድየ ፡ ወእመአከ ፡ በውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡየ ።

translations.lxx: And he said to me, The Lord God to whom I have been acceptable in his presence, himself shall send out his angel with thee, and shall prosper thy journey, and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my tribe, and of the house of my father.
translations.kjv: And he said unto me, The LORD, before whom I walk, will send his angel with thee, and prosper thy way; and thou shalt take a wife for my son of my kindred, and of my father’s house:

verses.geez: ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ትከውን ፡ እምነ ፡ መሐላየ ፡ ወእመሰ ፡ አበዩከ ፡ ውሂበ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ አንተ ፡ እመሐላ ።

translations.lxx: Then shalt thou be clear from my curse, for whensoever thou shalt have come to my tribe, and they shall not give her to thee, then shalt thou be clear from my oath.
translations.kjv: Then shalt thou be clear from this my oath, when thou comest to my kindred; and if they give not thee one, thou shalt be clear from my oath.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ መጻእኩ ፡ ዝየ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ እቤ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ አምላከ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ለእመ ፡ አንተ ፡
                  አውፃእከኒ ፡ ዮም ፡ በዛቲ ፡ ፍኖትየ ፡ እንተ ፡ አሐውር ፡ አነ ፤

translations.lxx: And having come this day to the well, I said, Lord God of my master Abraam, if thou prosperest my journey on which I am now going,
translations.kjv: And I came this day unto the well, and said, O LORD God of my master Abraham, if now thou do prosper my way which I go:

verses.geez:
ናሁ ፡ ቆምኩ ፡ መልዕልተ ፡ ዐዘቅተ ፡ ማይ ፡ ወአዋልደ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ይወጽኣ ፡ ይቅድሓ ፡ ማየ ፡ ወትኩን ፡
                  ይእቲ ፡ ድንግል ፡ እንተ ፡ አነ ፡ እብላ ፡ አስትይኒ ፡ ማየ ፡ ሕቀ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቀሡትኪ ፤

translations.lxx: behold, I stand by the well of water, and the daughters of the men of the city come forth to draw water, and it shall be that the damsel to whom I shall say, Give me a little water to drink out of thy pitcher,
translations.kjv: Behold, I stand by the well of water; and it shall come to pass, that when the virgin cometh forth to draw water, and I say to her, Give me, I pray thee, a little water of thy pitcher to drink;

verses.geez:
ወትበለኒ ፡ ስተይ ፡ አንተኒ ፡ ወለአግማሊከኒ ፡ እቅዳሕ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ብእሲት ፡ እንተ ፡ አስተዳለውከ ፡ ለገብርከ ፡
                  ይስሐቅ ፡ እግዚኦ ፡ ወቦቱ ፡ ኣአምር ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርከ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ለአብርሃም ።

translations.lxx: and she shall say to me, Both drink thou, and I will draw water for thy camels, this shall be the wife whom the Lord has prepared for his own servant Isaac; and hereby shall I know that thou hast wrought mercy with my master Abraam.
translations.kjv: And she say to me, Both drink thou, and I will also draw for thy camels: let the same be the woman whom the LORD hath appointed out for my master’s son.

verses.geez:
ወኮነ ፡ እንበለ ፡ ኣኅልቅ ፡ ሐልዮ ፡ በልብየ ፡ በጊዜሃ ፡ ወወፅአት ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ወትጸውር ፡ ቀሡታ ፡ ወወረደት ፡ ውስተ
                  ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ወቀድሐት ፡ ወእቤላ ፡ አስትይኒ ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass before I had done speaking in my mind, straightway Rebecca came forth, having her pitcher on her shoulders; and she went down to the well, and drew water; and I said to her, Give me to drink.
translations.kjv: And before I had done speaking in mine heart, behold, Rebekah came forth with her pitcher on her shoulder; and she went down unto the well, and drew water: and I said unto her, Let me drink, I pray thee.

verses.geez: ወአውረደት ፡ ቀሡታ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ ስተይ ፡ አንተ ፡ ወለአግማሊከኒ ፡ ኣሰቲ ።

translations.lxx: And she hasted and let down her pitcher on her arm from her head, and said, Drink thou, and I will give thy camels drink; and I drank, and she gave the camels drink.
translations.kjv: And she made haste, and let down her pitcher from her shoulder, and said, Drink, and I will give thy camels drink also: so I drank, and she made the camels drink also.

verses.geez:
ወተስእልክዋ ፡ ወእቤላ ፡ ወለተ ፡ መኑ ፡ አንቲ ፡ ንግርኒ ፡ ወትቤለኒ ፡ ወለተ ፡ ባቱኤል ፡ አነ ፡ ወልደ ፡ ናኮር ፡
                  ዘወለደት ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ሜልካ ፡ ወአሰርገውክዋ ፡ አዕኑገ ፡ ወአውቃፈ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እዴሃ ።

translations.lxx: And I asked her, and said, Whose daughter art thou? tell me; and she said, I am daughter of Bathuel the son of Nachor, whom Melcha bore to him; and I put on her the ear-rings, and the bracelets on her hands.
translations.kjv: And I asked her, and said, Whose daughter art thou? And she said, The daughter of Bethuel, Nahor’s son, whom Milcah bare unto him: and I put the earring upon her face, and the bracelets upon her hands.

verses.geez:
[ወ]ሶበ ፡ አደመተኒ ፡ ሰገድኩ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወአእኰትክዎ ፡ ለአምላከ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ ዘአውፅአኒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖተ
                  ፡ ጽድቅ ፡ ከመ ፡ እንሣእ ፡ ወለተ ፡ እኁሁ ፡ ለእግዚእየ ፡ ለወልዱ ።

translations.lxx: And being well-pleased I worshipped the Lord, and I blessed the Lord the God of my master Abraam, who has prospered me in a true way, so that I should take the daughter of my master's brother for his son.
translations.kjv: And I bowed down my head, and worshipped the LORD, and blessed the LORD God of my master Abraham, which had led me in the right way to take my master’s brother’s daughter unto his son.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰ ፡ ትገብሩ ፡ ምሕረተ ፡ ወጽድቀ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ንግሩኒ ፡ ወእማእኮ ፡ እትመየጥ ፡ እማእኮ ፡ የማነ ፡
                  ወእማእኮ ፡ ፀጋመ ።

translations.lxx: If then ye will deal mercifully and justly with my lord, tell me, and if not, tell me, that I may turn to the right hand or to the left.
translations.kjv: And now if ye will deal kindly and truly with my master, tell me: and if not, tell me; that I may turn to the right hand, or to the left.

verses.geez:
ወአውሥእዎ ፡ ባቱኤል ፡ ወላባ ፡ ወይቤሉ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ኮነ ፡ ዝነገር ፡ ወኢንክል ፡ ተዋሥኦ ፡ ኢሠናየ ፡
                  ወኢእኩየ ።

translations.lxx: And Laban and Bathuel answered and said, This matter has come forth from the Lord, we shall not be able to answer thee bad or good.
translations.kjv: Then Laban and Bethuel answered and said, The thing proceedeth from the LORD: we cannot speak unto thee bad or good.

verses.geez: ነያ ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ንሥኣ ፡ ወሑር ፡ ወትኩን ፡ ብእሲተ ፡ ወልደ ፡ እግዚእከ ፡ በከመ ፡ ይቤ ፡ እግዚእ ።

translations.lxx: Behold, Rebecca is before thee, take her and go away, and let her be wife to the son of thy master, as the Lord has said.
translations.kjv: Behold, Rebekah is before thee, take her, and go, and let her be thy master’s son’s wife, as the LORD hath spoken.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ሰገደ ፡ ዲበ ፡ ምድር ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when the servant of Abraam heard these words, he bowed himself to the Lord down to the earth.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, that, when Abraham’s servant heard their words, he worshipped the LORD, bowing himself to the earth.

verses.geez:
ወአውጽአ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ሰርጐ ፡ ወርቅ ፡ ወብሩር ፡ [ወአልባሰ ፡ ሠናይተ ፡ ወወሀባ ፡] ለርብቃ ፡ ወወሀቦሙ ፡
                  አምኃሆሙ ፡ ለ[እኁ]ሃ ፡ ወለእማኒ ።

translations.lxx: And the servant having brought forth jewels of silver and gold and raiment, gave them to Rebecca, and gave gifts to her brother, and to her mother.
translations.kjv: And the servant brought forth jewels of silver, and jewels of gold, and raiment, and gave them to Rebekah: he gave also to her brother and to her mother precious things.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ በልዑ ፡ ወሰትዩ ፡ ውእቱኒ ፡ ወእለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ወቤቱ ፡ ወተንሥኡ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወይቤ ፡ ፈንውኒ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  እሑር ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚእየ ።

translations.lxx: And both he and the men with him ate and drank and went to sleep. And he arose in the morning and said, Send me away, that I may go to my master.
translations.kjv: And they did eat and drink, he and the men that were with him, and tarried all night; and they rose up in the morning, and he said, Send me away unto my master.

verses.geez: ወይቤሉ ፡ እኁሃ ፡ ወእማኒ ፡ ትንበር ፡ ወለትነ ፡ ዐሡረ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ምስሌነ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ትሑር ።

translations.lxx: And her brethren and her mother said, Let the virgin remain with us about ten days, and after that she shall depart.
translations.kjv: And her brother and her mother said, Let the damsel abide with us a few days, at the least ten; after that she shall go.

verses.geez: ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ኢተአኅዙኒ ፡ እንዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ሠርሐኒ ፡ ፍኖትየ ፡ ፈንውኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ እሑር ፡ ኀበ ፡ እግዚእየ ።

translations.lxx: But he said to them, Hinder me not, for the Lord has prospered my journey for me; send me away, that I may depart to my master.
translations.kjv: And he said unto them, Hinder me not, seeing the LORD hath prospered my way; send me away that I may go to my master.

verses.geez: ወይቤልዎ ፡ [ንጸውዓ ፡] ለርብቃ ፡ ወንስማዕ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አፉሃ ።

translations.lxx: And they said, Let us call the damsel, and enquire at her mouth.
translations.kjv: And they said, We will call the damsel, and enquire at her mouth.

verses.geez: ወጸውዕዋ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ ወይቤልዋ ፡ ተሐውሪኑ ፡ ምስለዝ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወትቤ ፡ አሐውር ።

translations.lxx: And they called Rebecca, and said to her, Wilt thou go with this man? and she said, I will go.
translations.kjv: And they called Rebekah, and said unto her, Wilt thou go with this man? And she said, I will go.

verses.geez: ወፈነውዋ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ንዋይ ፡ ወለወልደ ፡ አብርሃምኒ ፡ ፈነውዎ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: So they sent forth Rebecca their sister, and her goods, and the servant of Abraam, and his attendants.
translations.kjv: And they sent away Rebekah their sister, and her nurse, and Abraham’s servant, and his men.

verses.geez:
ወባረክዋ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ እኅቶሙ ፡ ወይቤልዋ ፡ እኅትነ ፡ አንቲ ፡ ወኩኒ ፡ አእላፈ ፡ ወአእላፈ ፡ አእላፍ ፡ ወይረስ ፡
                  ዘርእኪ ፡ አህጉረ ፡ ፀር ።

translations.lxx: And they blessed Rebecca, and said to her, Thou art our sister; become thou thousands of myriads, and let thy seed possess the cities of their enemies.
translations.kjv: And they blessed Rebekah, and said unto her, Thou art our sister, be thou the mother of thousands of millions, and let thy seed possess the gate of those which hate them.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአት ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ወሐፃኒታ ፡ (ዲቦራ ፡) ወተጽእና ፡ በአግማሊሆን ፡ ወሖራ ፡ ምስለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ወተወፈያ
                  ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ ወሖሩ ።

translations.lxx: And Rebecca rose up and her maidens, and they mounted the camels and went with the man; and the servant having taken up Rebecca, departed.
translations.kjv: And Rebekah arose, and her damsels, and they rode upon the camels, and followed the man: and the servant took Rebekah, and went his way.

verses.geez:
ወይስሐቅሰ ፡ ይዋሒ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ መንገለ ፡ ዐዘቅት ፡ ወሀለዉ ፡ ኅዱራን ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡
                  [አዜብ] ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac went through the wilderness to the well of the vision, and he dwelt in the land toward the south.
translations.kjv: And Isaac came from the way of the well Lahairoi; for he dwelt in the south country.

verses.geez:
ወወጽአ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ይዛዋዕ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ፍና ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ነጸረ ፡ ርእየ ፡ አግማለ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይመጽኡ
                  ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac went forth into the plain toward evening to meditate; and having lifted up his eyes, he saw camels coming.
translations.kjv: And Isaac went out to meditate in the field at the eventide: and he lifted up his eyes, and saw, and, behold, the camels were coming.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ ትኔጽር ፡ ርብቃ ፡ ርእየቶ ፡ ሊይስሐቅ ፡ ወወረደት ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ገመላ ።

translations.lxx: And Rebecca lifted up her eyes, and saw Isaac; and she alighted briskly from the camel,
translations.kjv: And Rebekah lifted up her eyes, and when she saw Isaac, she lighted off the camel.

verses.geez:
ወተስእለቶ ፡ ለውእቱ ፡ ወልድ ፡ ወትቤሎ ፡ መኑ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘያንሶሱ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ዘይትቄበለነ
                  ፡ ወይቤላ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚእየ ፡ ወነሥአት ፡ ሞጣሕተ ፡ ወተከድነት ፡ ገጻ ።

translations.lxx: and said to the servant, Who is that man that walks in the plain to meet us? And the servant said, This is my master; and she took her veil and covered herself.
translations.kjv: For she had said unto the servant, What man is this that walketh in the field to meet us? And the servant had said, It is my master: therefore she took a vail, and covered herself.

verses.geez: ወዜነዎ ፡ ሊይስሐቅ ፡ ወልዱ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘከመ ፡ ገብረ ።

translations.lxx: And the servant told Isaac all that he had done.
translations.kjv: And the servant told Isaac all things that he had done.

verses.geez:
ወቦአ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ቤተ ፡ እሙ ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ነሥኣ ፡ ለርብቃ ፡ ወኮነቶ ፡ ብእሲቶ ፡ ወአፍቀራ ፡ ወአንገፍዎ ፡ ላሐ ፡
                  በእንተ ፡ እሙ ፡ ለይስሐቅ ።

translations.lxx: And Isaac went into the house of his mother, and took Rebecca, and she became his wife, and he loved her; and Isaac was comforted for Sarrha his mother.
translations.kjv: And Isaac brought her into his mother Sarah’s tent, and took Rebekah, and she became his wife; and he loved her: and Isaac was comforted after his mother’s death.
